name: Band Shoulder Warm-Up Stretch
shortDescription: A shoulder stretch and mobility drill using a resistance band to warm up the deltoids and rotator cuff.
instructions: Grip a resistance band with both hands wider than shoulder-width. Keep arms straight and move the band from hips, overhead, and behind the back to stretch the shoulders, then reverse the motion. Maintain a steady, controlled movement.
steps: Stand tall and grip band with hands wider than shoulders.
Hold arms straight, band in front of thighs.
Slowly raise band overhead while keeping arms straight.
Move band behind head and down to lower back.
Reverse the movement to bring band to starting position.
